::: {#fig-bench-2ch}

```{python}
#| label: fig-bench-2ch
#| fig-cap: "Tagma 2-channel performance summary. CoordPath provides O(1) single-element addressing at 0.39 ns. CoordCube provides spatial region generation at 55-699 Melem/s. The two channels operate on the same bytes with zero conversion overhead (960 ps)."
dot("""
graph G {
  layout=neato  overlap=false  splines=true  sep=+4
  node [shape=box style=rounded]

  subgraph cluster_ch1 {
    label="Channel 1: CoordPath (addressing)";  fontsize=11 color="#4169E1"
    lookup [label="Direct array lookup\\n0.39 ns (single Coord)\\n0.39 ns flat (any N dense)\\n2.69-58.6 ns (N=3-19 tree)" fillcolor="#ADD8E6" style=filled]
    prefix [label="Prefix scan\\n26.4 Melem/s (N=2)" fillcolor="#87CEEB" style=filled]
    set_and [label="CoordSet AND\\n338 Melem/s (axis filter)" fillcolor="#4682B4" fontcolor=white style=filled]
    lookup -- prefix -- set_and [style=invis]
  }

  subgraph cluster_ch2 {
    label="Channel 2: CoordCube (spatial)";  fontsize=11 color="#228B22"
    prox [label="Proximity (r=1)\\n96 Melem/s\\nProximity (r=5)\\n353 Melem/s" fillcolor="#90EE90" style=filled]
    box [label="Bounding box\\n289-699 Melem/s\\n(N=2..6)" fillcolor="#3CB371" fontcolor=white style=filled]
    dist [label="Distance metrics\\n~320 ps (any)\\" fillcolor="#006400" fontcolor=white style=filled]
    prox -- box -- dist [style=invis]
  }

  subgraph cluster_combined {
    label="Combined: SpatialKV";  fontsize=11 color="#8B008B" style=dashed
    kv [label="KV proximity (D=2, R=1)\\nDense: 31 Melem/s\\nSparse: 188 Melem/s\\nEmpty: 584 Melem/s" fillcolor="#DDA0DD" style=filled]
    convert [label="CoordPath ←→ CoordCube\\nconversion: 960 ps"]
    kv -- convert [style=invis]
  }

  subgraph cluster_note {
    label="Key insight";  fontsize=11  style=dotted
    note [label="No other system provides both:\\nO(1) addressing AND spatial queries\\non the SAME identifier space\\nwith ZERO structural overhead" fontsize=10]
  }
}
""")
```

:::
